channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: pAnchAla-vaidikas
puru-references
item.description: Source: TW The pUru-s as per the mahAbhArata were the preeminent yayAtian clan who established the dynastic seat to which the bharata-s & their successors the kuru-s & pa~nchAla-s ascended. In the R^igveda the pUru-s are one of the most prominent clans. They mentioned at least 21 times as a clan. Of those 16 are what may be termed positive mentioned – i.e., the gods help them win. 3 are negative – where the gods cause them to lose or crush them.

item.title: purUrava-line
item.description: Source: TW manu vaivasvata iLa (daughter) X budhagavishThira Atreya the great descendent of atri, gavishThira, (who noted Mercury to be the first of the planets) and manu’s daughter founded the clan purUravA Ayu nAhusha yayAti—anu, druhyu, yadu and turvasha dynastys branch out paurava pUru janamejaya prAcItvata (conquers the eastern tocharian tribes) pravIra manasyu abhayada sudyumna bahugava saMyAti ahaMyAti raudrAshva jayatsena I avAcIna arihA I mahAbhauma ayutanAyI (sacrifices his captured foes in a purushamedha sacrifice +++(5)+++) akrodhana I devAtithi II arihA II Rceyu matinAra (performs ashvamedha sacrifice) taMsu ilina dushmanta bhArata (conquers the whole of northern India, routs the dasyu chief bRbu) vidhathA bharadvAja (the bharadvAjas take over in coup) bhumanyu bRhatkshatra (rebel chief) suhotra hastI (founds hastinApura, it becomes the capital of bhAratas) vikuNthana ajAmIDha & purumIDha–sons dushmanta II and parameshThi found the pAnchAla dynasty) nIla shAnti sushAnti purujAnu cakSu bhRmyAshva mudgala brahmiSTha indrasena viduratha divodAsa mitrAyu (bhArgavas under mitrAyu take over of Hastinapura in coup) cyAvana sudAsa sahadeva somaka Rksha saMvarNa (pAnchAlas sack Hastinapura and drive kurus out) kuru (reestablishes the bhAratas in Hastinapura) avIkshit puppet rulers under bharadvAja and pAnchAla chiefs -
